issues.description: Effect array is empty. Card has a trigger-based effect: '[Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a DON!! card on the field is returned to your DON!! deck, this Leader gains +1000 power during this turn.' This requires at least one effect object with Trigger, conditions, and PowerBoost action.
effectText is missing or empty. Official text should be provided.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a DON!! card on the field is returned to your DON!! deck, this Leader gains +1000 power during this turn.
